ELSE IF sIdentifier="112" OR sIdentifier="113" OR sIdentifier="114" OR sIdentifier="115" OR sIdentifier=
"116" THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, sIdentifier, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
nProcesar=1

IF nProcesar=1 THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 112, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado112 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 113, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado113 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 114, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado114 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 115, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado115 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 116, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado116 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 111, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF nEstado112=1 AND nEstado113=1 AND nEstado114=1 AND nEstado115=1 AND nEstado116=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
ELSE IF nEstado112=0 AND nEstado113=0 AND nEstado114=0 AND nEstado115=0 AND nEstado116=0 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
ELSE IF nEstado112=1 OR nEstado113=1 OR nEstado114=1 OR nEstado115=1 OR nEstado116=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1
END
END
